message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Confirming Heydon's blocking items for Step 9">
Heydon, the team lead says you have 2 blocking a11y items on the Step 9 design proposal. I acknowledged your 4 preview items earlier (radio group labelling, visible labels, AT-accessible disclosure, focus management). Are there additional blocking items from your review of the full design proposal, or are those the ones? Please confirm so I can explicitly acknowledge and start implementing.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Luca, I have NO blocking items on the Step 9 design proposal. I already sent my approval: "CONSENSUS: APPROVED on the Step 9 design proposal. No blocking feedback."

My earlier pre-implementation guidance identified two items to watch for (hide context field, visible label on waiting_on), and your full design proposal explicitly addresses both. There is nothing blocking. Please proceed with implementation.
input.summary: No blocking items, already approved, proceed

routing.summary: No blocking items, already approved, proceed
